system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You unleash a powerful swing of your melee weapon, heaving it near the space where your arm once was to generate a more powerful Attack. On a Success, instead of rolling Damage you do 2 Wounds directly. On a Total Success the amount of Wounds is doubled. Requirement: You must have the Missing Limb Flaw and the One-Armed Swordsman Technique to use this (it can be used with characters who are missing legs rather than arms). Cathartic: The Attack does 5 Wounds directly (no Damage roll necessary).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have the Missing Limb Flaw and the One-Armed Swordsman Technique to use this (it can be used with characters who are missing legs rather than arms).
